scenes.text:
Show me your circle and I
will show you your future.

You are the average of the five people you spend the most time with. If everyone around you is complaining, you will complain. If everyone around you
is building, you will build. Your environment is not just where you live. It is who you listen to, what you consume, and what you tolerate.

You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall
to the level of your environment. Change the inputs, change the output.

Protect your circle like you protect your
bank account. Both determine your wealth.

Share this with your circle.
Follow for more truth bombs.
